retention.rule: Retained closeout evidence preserves reportable closeout facts when the full execplan archive exceeds inventory size guardrails.

active_milestone.scope: Runtime closeout/proof/report support plus existing Planning, Verification, Memory, and reporting guidance surfaces.

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Use existing surfaces; no new refactoring module, state store, or authoritative business-logic inference.

delegated_judgment.escalate when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
